sentences.target: Am Bahnhof wartet jeder auf den Bus.
sentences.reading: /am ˈbaːnhoːf ˈvaʁtət ˈjeːdɐ aʊf deːn bʊs/

translations.de: Am Bahnhof wartet jeder auf den Bus.
translations.ipa: /am ˈbaːnhoːf ˈvaʁtət ˈjeːdɐ aʊf deːn bʊs/
translations.en: At the station, everyone is waiting for the bus.
translations.es: En la estación, todos esperan el autobús.
translations.fr: À la gare, tout le monde attend le bus.
translations.zh-Hans: 在车站，大家都在等公交车。
translations.yue: 喺車站，大家都等緊巴士。
translations.pt: Na estação, todos estão esperando o ônibus.
translations.vi: Ở ga, mọi người đang đợi xe buýt.
translations.nl: Op het station wacht iedereen op de bus.
translations.uk: На вокзалі всі чекають на автобус.
translations.hu: Az állomáson mindenki a buszra vár.
translations.hi: स्टेशन पर सब लोग बस का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Na dworcu wszyscy czekają na autobus.
translations.el: Στον σταθμό, όλοι περιμένουν το λεωφορείο.
translations.nb: På stasjonen venter alle på bussen.
translations.id: Di stasiun, semua orang menunggu bus.
translations.sv: På stationen väntar alla på bussen.
translations.ro: La gară, toată lumea așteaptă autobuzul.
translations.cs: Na nádraží všichni čekají na autobus.
translations.da: På stationen venter alle på bussen.
translations.ja: 駅でみんなはバスを待っています。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition marking location; governs dative; introduces the locative PP.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'am' in dative; denotes the location.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; selects a prepositional complement with 'auf' (+ accusative).
Indefinite pronoun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Preposition selected by 'warten' (warten auf); governs accusative; introduces the object of waiting.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; agrees with 'Bus'.
Common noun, masculine accusative singular; object of the preposition 'auf'.

translations.en: Today, everyone is helping with the housework.
translations.es: Hoy todos ayudan en la casa.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, tout le monde aide à la maison.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天大家都在帮忙做家务。
translations.yue: 今日大家都幫手做家務。
translations.pt: Hoje todos estão ajudando em casa.
translations.tr: Bugün herkes ev işlerine yardım ediyor.
translations.vi: Hôm nay ai cũng giúp việc nhà.
translations.ar: اليوم يساعد الجميع في أعمال المنزل.
translations.nl: Vandaag helpt iedereen in het huishouden.
translations.hi: आज सभी घर के काम में मदद कर रहे हैं।
translations.nb: I dag hjelper alle til hjemme.
translations.id: Hari ini semua orang membantu pekerjaan rumah.
translations.sv: I dag hjälper alla til hemma.
translations.ro: Astăzi toată lumea ajută în casă.
translations.da: I dag hjælper alle til derhjemme.
translations.ja: 今日はみんなが家事を手伝っています。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb; sets the time frame for the event.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; intransitive here; takes a locative PP ('im Haushalt').
Indefinite pronoun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition marking location; governs dative; introduces the PP.
Common noun, masculine dative singular; object of 'im'; denotes the domain/context of helping.

sentences.target: In unserer Klasse kennt jeder Tim.

translations.de: In unserer Klasse kennt jeder Tim.
translations.en: In our class, everyone knows Tim.
translations.es: En nuestra clase, todos conocen a Tim.
translations.fr: Dans notre classe, tout le monde connaît Tim.
translations.it: Nella nostra classe, tutti conoscono Tim.
translations.zh-Hans: 在我们班里，大家都认识蒂姆。
translations.ru: В нашем классе все знают Тима.
translations.pt: Na nossa turma, todos conhecem o Tim.
translations.he: בכיתה שלנו כולם מכירים את טים.
translations.vi: Trong lớp chúng tôi, ai cũng biết Tim.
translations.nl: In onze klas kent iedereen Tim.
translations.uk: У нашому класі всі знають Тіма.
translations.hi: हमारी कक्षा में सब लोग टिम को जानते हैं।
translations.pl: W naszej klasie wszyscy znają Tima.
translations.el: Στην τάξη μας, όλοι γνωρίζουν τον Τιμ.
translations.nb: I klassen vår kjenner alle Tim.
translations.id: Di kelas kami, semua orang mengenal Tim.
translations.sv: I vår klass känner alla Tim.
translations.ro: În clasa noastră, toată lumea îl cunoaște pe Tim.
translations.cs: V naší třídě všichni znají Tima.
translations.da: I vores klasse kender alle Tim.
translations.ja: 私たちのクラスでは、みんながティムを知っています。

tokens.explanation: Preposition marking location/context; with static meaning it governs dative; introduces the PP.
Possessive determiner, feminine dative singular; agrees with 'Klasse' inside the PP.
Common noun, feminine dative singular; object of 'in'; sets the frame ('in our class').
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; transitive verb selecting an accusative object.
Indefinite pronoun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Proper noun; accusative direct object of 'kennt'.

sentences.target: Im Kino hat jeder ein Ticket.

translations.de: Im Kino hat jeder ein Ticket.
translations.en: At the cinema, everyone has a ticket.
translations.es: En el cine, todos tienen una entrada.
translations.fr: Au cinéma, tout le monde a un billet.
translations.it: Al cinema, tutti hanno un biglietto.
translations.ru: В кино у всех есть билет.
translations.vi: Ở rạp phim, ai cũng có vé.
translations.nl: In de bioscoop heeft iedereen een kaartje.
translations.uk: У кінотеатрі в усіх є квиток.
translations.hi: सिनेमा में सभी के पास टिकट है।
translations.id: Di bioskop, semua orang punya tiket.
translations.ro: La cinema, toată lumea are bilet.
translations.ja: 映画館でみんながチケットを持っています。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition marking location; governs dative; introduces the PP.
Common noun, neuter dative singular; object of 'im'; locative setting.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; expresses possession.
Indefinite pronoun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Indefinite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner for 'Ticket' as direct object.
Common noun, neuter accusative singular; direct object of 'hat'.

Im Kino hat jeder ein Ticket.
